if.test: request != null and request.operator != null and request.operator != ''

where.if: AND ( u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.operator}, '%') OR u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.operator}, '%') )

if.test: request != null and request.moduleCode != null and request.moduleCode != ''

mapper.select:
SELECT l.id AS id, l.operate_time AS operateTime, COALESCE(NULLIF(u.real_name, ''), u.username, CAST(l.user_id AS CHAR)) AS operator, l.module_code AS moduleCode, l.action_code AS actionCode, l.button_name AS buttonName, COALESCE(NULLIF(l.biz_key, ''), CAST(l.biz_id AS CHAR)) AS bizIdentifier, l.content AS content, l.result_status AS resultStatus, l.error_message AS errorMessage FROM sys_operation_log l LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = l.user_id
ORDER BY l.operate_time DESC, l.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_operation_log l LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = l.user_id
